policy_purpose: Defines staff-side roster lifecycle as a control plane over the students business module.
rules: Approved or activated school required for roster actions.
Blocked or suspended school blocks new roster upload, lock and candidate generation.
School ID is server-derived or server-validated against staff assignment scope.
Roster source is always recorded: school_uploaded, staff_uploaded_on_behalf, migration, correction_batch.
Downstream modules use locked rosters only.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
